summary: HR Module Phase 1 Testing Complete - All features verified: Attendance Tracking (session management, daily calculation, HR approval), Payroll Management (bulk generation, payment marking, payslip generation), Leave Management (apply, approve/reject, cancel, balance tracking). RBAC enforcement working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to span elements inside table rows - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: CEO login (ceo@wisedrive.com / password123)
Finance Manager login (finance.my@wisedrive.com / password123)
POST /api/hr/session/start - Session start on login
POST /api/hr/session/heartbeat - Session heartbeat for activity tracking
POST /api/hr/session/end - Session end on logout
GET /api/hr/sessions/active - Get active sessions (HR/CEO only)
POST /api/hr/sessions/{id}/force-logout - Force logout capability (HR/CEO only)
GET /api/hr/attendance - Get attendance records with month/year filter
GET /api/hr/attendance/summary/{employee_id} - Get attendance summary
GET /api/hr/attendance/pending-approvals - Get pending attendance approvals (HR only)
POST /api/hr/attendance/calculate-daily - Run daily attendance calculation (HR only)
POST /api/hr/attendance/{id}/override - Override attendance status (HR only)
GET /api/hr/payroll - Get payroll records with month/year filter
GET /api/hr/payroll/summary/{month}/{year} - Get payroll summary
POST /api/hr/payroll/generate-bulk - Bulk generate payroll (HR only)
POST /api/hr/payroll/{id}/mark-paid - Mark payroll as paid (Finance/CEO only)
POST /api/hr/payroll/{id}/generate-payslip - Generate PDF payslip
GET /api/hr/leave/my-balance - Get own leave balance
GET /api/hr/leave/my-requests - Get own leave requests
POST /api/hr/leave/apply - Apply for leave (Casual/Sick)
GET /api/hr/leave/pending-approvals - Get pending leave approvals (HR/Manager only)
POST /api/hr/leave/{id}/approve - Approve/Reject leave request
POST /api/hr/leave/{id}/cancel - Cancel leave request
GET /api/hr/leave/team-summary - Get team leave summary
RBAC: Finance Manager cannot generate payroll (403)
RBAC: Finance Manager cannot force logout sessions (403)
RBAC: Finance Manager cannot override attendance (403)
RBAC: Finance Manager cannot view pending leave approvals (403)
UI: HR Module page loads with 3 tabs (Attendance, Payroll, Leave)
UI: Attendance Dashboard shows summary cards (Present, Pending Approval, Absent, Active Now)
UI: Active Sessions list with Force Logout buttons (HR/CEO only)
UI: Attendance Records table with employee data
UI: Payroll tab shows monthly summary cards (Total Employees, Total Net Salary, Paid, Pending Payment)
UI: Generate Payroll button and dialog (HR/CEO only)
UI: Payroll Records table with payment status
UI: View Payroll Details dialog with Earnings, Deductions, Attendance Summary, Net Salary
UI: Leave Management shows balance cards (Casual Leave, Sick Leave, Total Available, Pending Requests)
UI: Apply for Leave dialog with Leave Type, Start/End Date, Duration Type, Reason fields
UI: My Leave Requests table with status badges
UI: Finance Manager sees correct RBAC-restricted view (no Generate Payroll, no Force Logout, no Run Daily Calculation)
critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in console for table elements - span elements being inserted inside tbody/tr/td. This is a cosmetic issue from the development tooling and does not affect functionality.
seed_data_creation: Test leave requests created during testing (TEST_Leave application for testing, TEST_Leave to be cancelled, TEST_Leave to be rejected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Module Phase 1 fully tested and working. Key features: 1) Attendance Tracking - Session management (start/heartbeat/end), active sessions view with force logout, attendance records with HR override capability, daily calculation cron job. 2) Payroll Management - Bulk payroll generation, payment marking with transaction reference, payslip PDF generation, payroll details view with earnings/deductions breakdown. 3) Leave Management - Apply for leave (Casual/Sick), leave balance tracking, approval workflow, team summary. RBAC properly enforced: HR/CEO can generate payroll and force logout, Finance Manager can only mark payments.
